title: pelargonium × nonfordium
intro: Pelargonium × nonfordium, also known as Rose Geranium, is a hybrid plant of the Pelargonium genus, characterized by its fragrant leaves and pink or white flowers. The medicinal properties of Rose Geranium include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Rose Geranium include relief from anxiety, stress, and insomnia, as well as its ability to regulate menstrual cycles and alleviate symptoms of menopause. Rose Geranium is often used in herbal preparations such as essential oils, teas, and tinctures, which can be used in aromatherapy, skincare routines, and natural remedies for various ailments.
